chat.error_retry: Uh... wait. Something's wrong. Try again.
chat.tutorial_greeting: {nickname}, you're wearing that again? Didn't I tell you it looks weird last time?
chat.tutorial_mission: Heh, who do you think I am? Ugh... it's so frustrating I'll handle it myself. Consider yourself lucky that I, Seah, am personally reviewing your outfit. Come on, send me the worst one you have.
chat.tutorial_evaluation: Oh boy, what to do with this... It's really hopeless. But... well, you have the basics, so if I fix it up a bit...
chat.tutorial_reward: Here, take this for reference! It's not like I prepared this specifically for you or anything!
chat.tutorial_end: Anyway! Don't wear just anything without my permission from now on!
chat.illustration_unlocked: Huh? Wait... take this. Specially for you!
chat.illustration_unlocked_low: Sigh... I can't even look at it. Just look at this and please study some fashion. It's for studying, so don't get any funny ideas!
chat.illustration_unlocked_mid: Well... A for effort. Still a long way to go, but use this to improve your sense.
chat.illustration_unlocked_high: Hmph... not bad? This is... I didn't prepare this for you, but... today's outfit was passable. So I'm giving it to you specially. Don't misunderstand!
chat.edited_image_intro: By the way, if you follow my advice, it would look like this. Learn from it!
chat.tutorial_tap_here: Tap here and Seah will evaluate your outfit!
chat.tutorial_mock_critique: Hey, where do you think you're going dressed like that? If you keep dressing like this, everyone’s going to think you have zero interest in fashion. I'll let the plaid shirt and the grey tee slide, but those cargo shorts look so bulky they make your legs look way shorter. And socks with slides? Seriously? Honestly, you should put in more effort even for a quick run to the grocery store. It’s so focused on comfort that it lacks personality; it just looks like you threw on whatever, which is a shame.
chat.tutorial_mock_solution: Take all that off. Try switching the top to something clean and simple, like a navy linen shirt. For the bottoms, ditch those bulky cargo shorts and go with something that has a slimmer fit, like beige chino shorts—it’ll look much better. As for shoes, swap the socks and slides for a pair of clean white sneakers. It’ll give you a much more polished and sophisticated look.
chat.tutorial_mock_critique_female: Hey, where exactly do you think you're going? Please tell me you're not actually planning to head out like this? This is painfully low-effort. Honestly, this combination is just too confusing for everyday wear. The grey sweatshirt on top isn't terrible on its own, but pairing it with those plaid pants makes the whole thing look like you just rolled out of bed in your pajamas. It makes your legs look shorter too, and the baggy fit isn't doing you any favors. Socks with sandals?! Who does that? All those badges on your bag look awkward, and the whole outfit just feels like you grabbed whatever was closest. Everything is clashing — calling this 'casual' is honestly a stretch.
chat.tutorial_mock_solution_female: Start over from scratch. For the top, try a soft beige knit or blouse. For the bottom, pair it with straight-fit raw denim that makes your legs look longer. Swap the sandals for clean white sneakers — way more polished. And replace that badge-covered bag with a sleek mini crossbody bag for a much more put-together look.
chat.tutorial_outro: Anyway! Don't just wear anything without my approval from now on!

gallery.title: Memory Gallery
gallery.ai_generated_notice: This illustration was generated by AI.
gallery.illustration_description: An illustration containing special memories with Seah.
gallery.seah_quote: Take this for reference! It's not like I prepared this specifically for you or anything!
gallery.info_content:
【 1. Illustration Grades 】

All illustrations with 'Seah' are divided into 5 grades based on rarity.

• [Scorn]: Special(?) records obtained only when you receive the worst evaluation. Features a cracked B&W frame.

• [Normal]: Captures small daily moments with Seah. Decorated with a light gray frame.

• [Rare]: Moments where you got closer through consistent effort. Features a light blue ribbon frame.

• [Legendary]: Dramatic moments in your relationship with Seah. Treasured in a shiny gold frame.

• [Seasonal]: Limited edition memories available only during specific periods. Marked with a special frame and clock icon.


【 2. How to Obtain 】

Illustrations are automatically obtained when specific conditions are met during Seah's outfit evaluation. Touch a locked illustration to see a hint.

• Achieve high scores
• Log in consistently
• Log in on special days/times
• Request evaluation for specific TPO


【 3. How to Save 】

Tap an illustration to view it full screen, then use the [Share] button to save to your device or show off to friends.


【 AI-Generated Content Notice 】

All illustrations in this gallery are images generated by artificial intelligence (AI).
gallery.share_text:
{nickname} shared the CodiCheck app!

📱 CodiCheck — AI Outfit Evaluation App
  └ AI childhood friend Seah evaluates your outfit directly

legal.terms_of_service_content: These terms govern the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between the Company and the User regarding the use of CodiCheck (the "Service").
legal.service_definition: "Service" refers to the AI outfit evaluation and related services provided by CodiCheck.
legal.user_definition: "User" refers to members and non-members who use the Service according to these terms.
legal.member_definition: "Member" refers to a person who has registered for the Service.
legal.privacy_policy_content: CodiCheck (the "Company") establishes and discloses this Privacy Policy to protect users' personal information in accordance with Article 30 of the Personal Information Protection Act.

tutorial.intro_slide_1:
Seah, your childhood friend and fashion influencer,
will evaluate your outfits directly.
tutorial.intro_slide_2:
Send a photo and Seah will review it carefully.
You'll get feedback, tips, shopping links,
and an AI-restyled outfit photo*.

*Paid ticket + score below 3.0 required
tutorial.intro_slide_3:
Achieve special conditions to unlock
Seah's secret illustrations.
Collect all 113 illustrations!
tutorial.intro_slide_4:
One free ticket is provided every day.
You can also purchase more in the shop.
tutorial.intro_slide_5:
Ready to go?
Let's meet Seah right now.
tutorial.banner_tip:
Tap this button to watch an ad
and get a free ticket once a day!
tutorial.gallery_tip:
You can view all unlocked illustrations here.
The more conditions you meet, the more you'll collect.
tutorial.shop_tip:
You can purchase paid tickets here.
Get more fashion advice from Seah!
tutorial.end_message: Now go get some style advice from Seah!
tutorial.critique_tip:
Seah gives your outfit a score
and shares her honest opinion.
Ratings range from 1.0 to 5.0.
tutorial.solution_tip:
For lower scores, Seah suggests
ways to improve your look
with specific advice.
tutorial.edited_outfit_tip:
With a paid ticket and a score below 3.0,
Seah creates an AI-restyled outfit image
based on her feedback.
This feature is not available with free tickets.
tutorial.shopping_links_tip:
Seah provides shopping links
so you can quickly find
the items you need to improve your look.
tutorial.illustration_tip:
Seah's illustrations unlock
when their conditions are met!
Check each illustration's unlock conditions
in the Gallery tab's detail view.
